query: Pokemon Showdown gen9 battle mechanics fainted Pokemon permanent cannot return HP zero
key_finding: A fainted Pokemon cannot return to battle or restore HP during the battle; permanently removed from active battle until revived between battles.

query: Pokemon battle move PP decreases never increases healing moves HP recovery same battle mechanics
key_finding: During a single battle, PP can only decrease (PP Up/Max only outside battle). HP CAN legitimately increase from non-zero via healing moves (Recover, Roost). Lunar Dance is the only in-battle PP restorer (full switch-out, irrelevant to monotone resource budget).
prevents_false_positive: Confirms hp_resurrection must be scoped to 0->positive only; a generic 'any HP increase' rule would false-positive on healing moves.

query: Pokemon Showdown forced switch own faint Pokemon removed from battle permanently protocol log
key_finding: Any Pokemon that faints must also be recalled; the trainer then switches in another. Faint and permanent removal are coupled in the protocol.

summary: 3 searches. Internet CONFIRMED all 7 rules Opus derived from development data in the no-internet run (A3). ZERO new rules discovered, ZERO rule changes. Marginal contribution of internet at the Opus tier = 0.000 dev F1, 0.000 val F1. Contrast: at Sonnet tier B2 gained +1 rule / +0.040 dev F1 from internet.
